commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=b181f666875af4fbeb182c12d8f51f53085e2552)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes Telegram dispatch to suppress transient previews when source replies resolve to message-tool-only delivery, extracting shared reply-runtime helpers for source-visible defaults and message-tool availability.

PR surface: Source +115, Tests +236. Total +351 across 8 files.

Reproducibility: Source-reproducible: current main creates Telegram draft streams before core dispatch can report `sourceReplyDeliveryMode: "message_tool_only"`, while the PR moves that policy check before draft callbacks are installed. The linked issue and PR body include real Telegram screenshots/log proof, but this read-only review did not run a live Telegram repro.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The blocker is maintainer API/product direction for the Plugin SDK contract, not a safe automated repair unless maintainers pick the desired seam.
commands.reason: comment version already processed in ledger
